title: Compared to Estimates, ResMed (RMD) Q4 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics

title: ResMed (RMD) Misses Q4 Earnings Estimates
text: ResMed (RMD) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.60 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.67 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.49 per share a year ago.
